description_long: This is a sleek, red Audi hatchback car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a sporty design. The car features a prominent front grille with the Audi logo, angular headlights, and large air intakes. The side view reveals two doors, distinctive carbon-fiber side panels, and stylish alloy wheels. The rear showcases a transparent engine cover, dual exhausts, and a detailed taillight assembly, along with the Audi badge. The windows are tinted, and the roofline slopes gently towards the rear, enhancing its sporty appearance. The overall build suggests a high-performance vehicle with a luxurious and modern finish.
description: A red Audi hatchback car with a sporty, aerodynamic design, carbon-fiber accents, and a transparent rear engine cover. Features include two doors, alloy wheels, and detailed front and rear assemblies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Audi grille, angular headlights, and a wide, low stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the carbon-fiber side panel, alloy wheels, and two-door configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the transparent engine cover, dual exhausts, Audi badge, and taillights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible carbon-fiber panel and wheel details.
